name: Badge
description: M3 badge / chip component. Uses rounded-full (pill shape) with tonal container colors. Supports filled, tonal, and outlined variants.
example:
<Badge variant="tonal" className="rounded-full bg-secondary-container text-on-secondary-container">Active</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline" className="rounded-full border-outline">Draft</Badge>
never: Never use raw <span> for status indicators -- use Badge
Never hardcode badge colors -- use variant prop with container tokens
Never use sharp corners on badges -- M3 badges are always rounded-full
